The '''flii''' was an insectoid creature, native to the forest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. They grew up to two meters in length and were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. One [[Species/Legends|species]] had green and yellow stripes. Other species included the [[Fyreflii]], the [[Mayflii]], and the [[Wingflii]].

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' {{1st}}
